taylor-williams.female_specific_note: Taylor Williams Coaching focuses on female-specific HRT/peptide guidance. Per-peptide notes here often emphasize female dosing, fertility, hormone interactions.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to weigh Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 13:03; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "I recommend one to two milligrams of thymogen per day for a cycle of 30 to 60 days, again, four to eight weeks, typically once or twice per year as a tune-up course." Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 13:33; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "However, if you did get an illness of iris sickness, something like that. I would use it in that case specifically, but if not, I think it's still just good to use one or two times per year."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 14:07; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "People with severe autoimmune diseases should use under medical supervision."
- Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 14:37; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "Pregnant or breastfeeding women should avoid due to lack of research in those populations."
- Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 14:07; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "you're going to see maybe some slight injection site redness or soreness, temporary fatigue or subtle appetite or mood shifts. They're very rare."
- Hunter Williams - saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329 (2026-04-08; 49:51; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329/): "Even if wanted to stay on it for year, The worst thing that would happen is that it just is not going to work anymore for that."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 15:41; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "Whereas thiamogen is a more targeted action on T lymphocyte maturation and cytokine profile regulation. Think of it as more of a precision tool for immune fine tuning." Taylor Williams - Cg7JtpnfRY4 (2026-04-18; 00:29:19.960; https://youtu.be/Cg7JtpnfRY4): "It's a bioregulator that's a little bit more targeted than thymolin which is another bioregulator."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Older Hunter library entry: Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 13:33; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "Again, thymogen is more of a reset button, not a permanent crutch or excuse me, permanent crutch nudging the immune system back on track and allowing it to function naturally." Hunter Williams - thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a (2026-03-30; 13:03; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/thymogen-a-targeted-immune-peptide-for-post-viral-recovery--003ef26a/): "I like to do this really at most two times per year." Newer Hunter library entry: Hunter Williams - saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329 (2026-04-08; 49:51; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329/): "No, I don't think that there's any issue. Even if wanted to stay on it for year, The worst thing that would happen is that it just is not going to work anymore for that." Hunter Williams - saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329 (2026-04-08; 50:32; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/saturday-morning-coffee-talk-11726--2c65a329/): "But I think the Imogen for as long as it's helping could be great."
